---
reference: inspect_ai.agent
description: Agent scaffolds and protocol.
---

## Agents

### react
### human_cli

## Deep Agent

::: callout-note
The `deepagent()` described below is available only in the development version of Inspect. To install the development version from GitHub:

``` bash
pip install git+https://github.com/UKGovernmentBEIS/inspect_ai
```
:::

### deepagent
### subagent
### Subagent
### research
### plan
### general


## Execution

### handoff
### run
### as_tool
### as_solver

## Bridging

### agent_bridge
### AgentBridge
### sandbox_agent_bridge
### SandboxAgentBridge
### BridgedToolsSpec

## Filters

### content_only
### last_message
### remove_tools
### MessageFilter

## Protocol

### Agent
### AgentState
### agent
### agent_with
### is_agent

## Types

### AgentPrompt
### AgentAttempts
### AgentContinue
### AgentSubmit

## Deprecated

### bridge
